docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NAZZ INVESTMENTS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
